zh.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson於1018年出生在法國諾門迪。他和Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir至少有1個女兒。他去世於1045年享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson于1018年出生在法国諾門迪。他和Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir至少有1个女儿。他去世于1045年享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bjornson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorn, Erik, Sig, Arni, Berger, Birgit, Lars, Ove, Selmer, Thor.
Americanized form of Swedish Björnsson or its rare variant Björnson: patronymic from the personal name Björn (see Bjorn ).
Americanized form of Norwegian Bjørnsen, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bjorn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Walfrid.

Danish and Norwegian (Bjørn); Swedish (Björn): from a personal name and nickname meaning ‘bear’ (Old Norse bjǫrn). The Norwegian name is often a shortened form of any of various habitational names from any of the places called with this word. In Swedish it is ornamental in some cases. Compare Ursin .

nameMeanings.name: Olaf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements anu ‘ancestor’ + leifr ‘heir, descendant’. St Olaf , King of Norway ( 995–1030 ), aided the spread of Christianity in his kingdom. The name was introduced to Britain before the Norman Conquest, but modern use as a given name in the English-speaking world originated in America, where it was taken by recent Scandinavian immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson was born in 1018, in Normandy, France. He had at least 1 daughter with Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir. He died in 1045, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson est né en 1018, à Normandie, France. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir. Il est décédé en 1045, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson wurde 1018 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Er hatte mit Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1045 im Alter von 27 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson è nato il nel 1018 nel Normandie, Francia. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir. Morì nel 1045, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornsonは1018年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた。彼はAnna Ingeberg Thrandsdottirとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1045年に27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson(은)는 1018년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났다. 그는 Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1045년 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson nasceu em 1018, em Normandie, França. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir. Ele faleceu em 1045, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Olaf Bjornson родился в 1018 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Anna Ingeberg Thrandsdottir. Он умер в 1045 г. в возрасте 27 лет.
